label: Transparent emerald motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout
Primary request: Create only an emerald crystal cluster in black matrix, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: premium emerald beryl crystal specimen, deep saturated green hexagonal crystals emerging from rugged black matrix rock with subtle cream beryl vein inclusions, opaque mineral surfaces with crisp facets, natural fractures, and polished highlights; mineralogical accuracy and strong silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the subject.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves deep green crystal color, black matrix texture, and cream vein detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Emerald, a premium dashboard system derived from emerald crystal clusters growing from black matrix rock with cream beryl vein inclusions.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the motif: deep emerald green crystals, near-black fractured matrix, cream mineral veins, pale mint highlights, graphite ink, warm ivory surfaces.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class source board.
Required visible sections: title Emerald, motif story beryl vein, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product dashboard system, precise grid, restrained luxury, 8px card radius, fine mineral texture, faceted divider lines, clean data visualization.
Color palette: deep emerald, crystal green, mint highlight, black matrix, graphite, cream vein, and ivory.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible microtext.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the Emerald design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Preserve the emerald crystal, black matrix, cream beryl vein, premium dashboard controls, shadcn/tweakcn-style components, precise grid, English typography, and Japanese typography from the light board.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class source board.
Required visible sections: title Emerald, Dark Mode label, motif story beryl vein, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Visual details: dark background derived from black matrix and graphite, emerald primary actions, mint highlights, cream vein accents, ivory text, subtle mineral texture overlays, faceted divider lines, crisp dashboard cards and controls.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no illegible text, no random brand names, no watermark.
